title: Optimized by Selim
description: "Optimized by Selim" enhances your Minecraft experience with Optifine's features, improving performance, graphics, and gameplay smoothness while maintaining visual quality.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdde62c84d68b7c219e92d51bebe5d43a6908787.png)
# **Optimized by Selim**

"Optimized by Selim" is a modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by incorporating optimization features from Optifine. This modpack focuses on boosting performance, improving graphics, and providing a smoother gameplay experience without compromising on visual quality. Whether you're looking for better frame rates, enhanced visuals, or a more responsive game, this modpack has got you covered.

Key Features:

- **Optifine Integration**: Enjoy all the beloved features of Optifine, including custom shaders, dynamic lighting, and advanced graphical settings.
  
- **Performance Boost**: Achieve higher FPS and reduced lag with a selection of performance-enhancing mods.
  
- **Visual Enhancements:** Experience Minecraft with improved textures, lighting effects, and more immersive environments.
  
- **Seamless Gameplay**: Optimized for a smooth and stable gameplay experience, perfect for both low-end and high-end systems.

Get ready to explore Minecraft like never before with "Optimized by Selim." Enhance your game, optimize your performance, and enjoy the best of both worlds!

<details>
<summary>Mods Included (39):</summary>

1. [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) by [Pepper_Bell](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepper_Bell) - Provides seamless textures by connecting blocks together for a smoother visual experience.

2. [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yet-another-config-lib) by [shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel) - A library for creating configuration menus in Minecraft mods.

3. [EMF - Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) - Adds additional features to entity models, enhancing their appearance and behavior.

4. [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-culling) by [fxmorin](https://modrinth.com/user/fxmorin) - Improves rendering performance by culling unnecessary block faces and entities.

5. [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC) - Provides various rendering optimizations to improve game performance.

6. [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by [shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel) - Required by many mods for creating and managing configurations.

7. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (mc1.20.1-0.5.11)by [caffeinemc team](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric) - A well-known mod that rewrites the rendering engine for improved performance using modern OpenGL features.

8. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (mc1.20.1-0.5.6)by [caffeinemc team](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric) - A different version of sodium for being compaitable with Nvidium.

9. [ETF - Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-texture-features) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) - Adds additional texture features to entities, improving their visual detail.

10. [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese) - Enhances the options menu of the Sodium mod for better usability.

11. [Starlight (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) by [Spottedleaf](https://modrinth.com/user/Spottedleaf) - Provides significant improvements to the Minecraft lighting engine for better performance.

12. [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) by [The Fabric Project](https://modrinth.com/user/FabricMC) - Adds Kotlin language support to the Fabric modding platform.

13. [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) by [Shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel) - Improves the GUI rendering performance by optimizing the drawing routines.

14. [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) by [Steveplays](https://modrinth.com/user/Steveplays) - Provides optimizations for world generation processes to reduce lag.

15. [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) by [juliand665](https://modrinth.com/user/juliand665) - Reduces the game's frame rate when the window is unfocused to save system resources.

16. [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-culling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) - Uses path tracing to cull entities that are not visible to the player, improving performance.

17. [lazy-language-loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazy-language-loader) by [ultimateboomer](https://modrinth.com/user/ultimateboomer) - Speeds up the game startup by loading languages more efficiently.

18. [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames) - Reimplements block entities for better performance and visual effects.

19. [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by [comp500](https://modrinth.com/user/comp500) - Required for Sodium's compatibility with various rendering features provided by other mods.

20. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [The Fabric Project](https://modrinth.com/user/FabricMC) - A core library required by many Fabric mods to function properly.

21. [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese) - Adds additional features and options to the Sodium mod.

22. [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) by [cortex](https://modrinth.com/user/cortex) - Provides performance improvements for systems with newer Nvidia GPUs.

23. [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland) - Adds multithreading optimizations for chunk loading, generation, and saving.

24. [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) by [Jaredlll08](https://modrinth.com/user/Jaredlll08) - Groups XP orbs together to reduce lag when there are many in the same area.

25. [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) - Adds support for shaders, improving visual effects and lighting.

26. [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) by [YaLTeR](https://modrinth.com/user/YaLTeR) - Enhances mouse control for inventory management.

27. [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) by [thosea](https://modrinth.com/user/thosea) - Provides various low-impact miscellaneous optimizations.

28. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [caffeinemc team](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric) - Well-known mod for general server-side optimizations.

29. [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) by [astei](https://modrinth.com/user/astei) - Delays the initialization of DFU to speed up the game startup.

30. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [TerraformersMC](https://modrinth.com/user/TerraformersMC) - Adds a mod menu to view and configure installed mods.

31. [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt) - Provides optimizations targeting load times and memory usage.

32. [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) by [Zacsharp](https://modrinth.com/user/Zacsharp) - A port of Forge's config API to Fabric.

33. [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) by [SHsuperCM](https://modrinth.com/user/SHsuperCM) - Adds support for custom item textures in Fabric.

34. [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) by [Aizistral](https://modrinth.com/user/Aizistral) - Provides options to protect against the chat reporting system introduced in Minecraft 1.19.1.

35. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferritecore) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811) - Reduces memory usage for improved performance.

36. [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) by [getchoo](https://modrinth.com/user/getchoo) - Allows adjusting thread priorities for better performance.

37. [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) by [EnnuiL](https://modrinth.com/user/EnnuiL) - Adds a zoom function to Minecraft for a better view of distant objects.

38. [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland) - Provides optimizations for handling many players on a server.

39. [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) by [LambdAurora](https://modrinth.com/user/LambdAurora) - Adds dynamic lighting effects for a more immersive experience.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>
Light suppression mob farms might now work because of Starlight(light-engine mod).
</details>
